metadata.purpose: Enhanced due diligence for high-value client onboarding

sections.title: Executive Summary
sections.purpose: High-level overview of due diligence findings

sections.title: Corporate Structure and Ownership
sections.purpose: Document the legal structure and identify beneficial owners
requirements: Legal entity type and registration details
Ownership structure including intermediate holding companies
Ultimate beneficial owners with ownership percentages
Board composition and key management personnel

sections.title: Business Activities and Operations
sections.purpose: Understand the nature and scope of business operations

sections.title: Regulatory and Compliance Assessment
sections.purpose: Evaluate regulatory standing and compliance history

sections.title: Risk Analysis and Recommendations
sections.purpose: Synthesize findings into actionable risk assessment

global_instructions: Apply enhanced due diligence standards. Document all information gaps. Cross-reference findings across sections for consistency.

terminology.UBO: Ultimate Beneficial Owner - natural person with >25% ownership or control
